title: peucedanum japonicum var. japonicum
intro: Peucedanum japonicum var. japonicum, also known as Japanese angelica tree, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Japanese angelica tree include dried roots, infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
